SELECT formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(datetime_field, 'HH:mm:ss') FROM test_dates WHERE datetime_field = toDateTime('2010-01-04 12:34:56');
SELECT formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(toDateTime(datetime_field + INTERVAL 1 DAY), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') FROM test_dates, other_dates;

SELECT a.datetime_field, formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(a.datetime_field, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') as formatted, b.date_field FROM test_dates a JOIN other_dates b ON a.datetime_field >= toDateTime(b.date_field);
